product_overview: MN+LA ERP is a web-based internal ERP for store and warehouse operations that enforces role-based access and shows live inventory across multiple locations. This PRD is based on the product specification (see page 1 overview, workflow table on page 2, and test environment on page 3) and captures required behaviors such as Owner/Admin full access, Store Associate restrictions, and Warehouse-only access (WF-01..WF-08).
core_goals: Enforce role-based access: Owner/Admin full access, Store Associate limited to assigned store for actions, Warehouse Staff limited to warehouse workflows.
Provide accurate, real-time inventory visibility across warehouses and store branches.
Keep warehouse and store inventory operations separated by location_id while allowing read-only visibility where appropriate.
Support standard store and warehouse workflows (inventory in/out, branch stocks, dispatch, factory release) with clear success and error handling.
Require Supabase authentication for protected routes and make behavior testable in the specified local test environment (port 5173).

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate users using Supabase Auth (email + password). Successful sign-in redirects to the master dashboard; invalid credentials surface an error message.
user_flows: Navigate to /login.html -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Sign In button to submit -> Redirect to /index.html -> See dashboard cards (Store Operations, Warehouse, Inventory, etc.)
Navigate to /login.html -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Sign In button to submit -> See error message on invalid credentials -> Stay on /login.html

features.name: Master Dashboard (Role-based)
features.description: Role-aware landing dashboard that shows modules (Store Operations, Warehouse, Inventory, etc.) and redirects users to the appropriate module views based on role and assigned location.
user_flows: Navigate to /index.html (authenticated as Owner/Admin) -> View dashboard cards (Store Operations, Warehouse, Inventory, etc.) -> Click Warehouse -> Navigate to /warehouse.html -> See Warehouse Dashboard

Navigate to /index.html (authenticated as Store Associate) -> View dashboard cards -> See only the assigned store as main Store Operations card -> Attempt to click a different store card -> See navigation disabled or access prevented
Navigate to /index.html without authentication -> Redirect to /login.html -> See login page

features.name: Store Dashboard
features.description: Store operations dashboard that displays store-specific stats and quick actions (Inventory In, Inventory Out, Branch Stocks, Sales Today). Store Associates see only their assigned store as the primary context.
user_flows: Navigate to /store.html (authenticated as Store Associate assigned to Store A) -> View store stats and quick actions -> Click Inventory In -> Navigate to /store-inventory-in.html -> See Inventory In form with Store A pre-selected

Navigate to /store.html (authenticated as Owner/Admin) -> View store stats and quick actions -> Click Branch Stocks -> Navigate to /store-branch-stocks.html -> See all branch stocks and live quantities
Navigate to /store.html (authenticated as Store Associate assigned to Store A) -> Try to switch main dashboard to Store B -> See branch switch disabled or 'access denied' message

features.name: Store Inventory In
features.description: Receive inventory into a store via barcode scan or manual entry. Store Associates may only post inventory to their assigned store location_id; they can view other branches' stock but cannot post there.
user_flows: Navigate to /store-inventory-in.html (authenticated as Store Associate assigned to Store A) -> Select branch (Store A) -> Scan or enter product -> Enter quantity -> Click submit -> See success confirmation -> See updated quantities on /store-branch-stocks.html

Navigate to /store-inventory-in.html (authenticated as Store Associate assigned to Store A) -> Select branch -> Scan or enter product -> Leave quantity blank -> Click submit -> See validation error for missing quantity -> Stay on /store-inventory-in.html

Navigate to /store-inventory-in.html (authenticated as Store Associate assigned to Store A) -> Attempt to select/store inventory into Store B -> See branch selection disabled or authorization error preventing submission

features.name: Warehouse Inventory In
features.description: Receive inventory into the warehouse by adding products and quantities; warehouse staff should be able to submit receives and see updated warehouse stocks.
user_flows: Navigate to /warehouse-inventory-in.html (authenticated as Warehouse Staff) -> Add products and quantities -> Click submit to receive -> See success confirmation -> Navigate to /warehouse-stocks.html -> See updated warehouse stock quantities
Navigate to /warehouse-inventory-in.html -> Add product but enter non-numeric or negative quantity -> Click submit -> See validation error for invalid quantity -> Stay on /warehouse-inventory-in.html

Navigate to /warehouse-inventory-in.html (authenticated as Store Associate without warehouse permission) -> Attempt to access receive form -> See access denied or redirect to /warehouse.html with limited options

features.name: Inventory Overview
features.description: Inventory summary view with links to factory release and warehouse dispatch workflows, and the ability to view inventory by location.
user_flows: Navigate to /inventory.html (authenticated) -> View inventory by location -> Click Factory Release -> Navigate to /factory-release.html -> See Factory Release form and ability to initiate release
Navigate to /inventory.html (authenticated) -> View inventory by location -> Click Warehouse Dispatch -> Navigate to /warehouse-dispatch.html -> See dispatch/transfer form
Navigate to /inventory.html without authentication -> Redirect to /login.html -> See login page

routes.description: Master dashboard, role-based redirect to store or warehouse

features.name: User Login
features.description: Sign in with email and password via Supabase Auth
user_interactions: Click Sign In button to submit
See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Master Dashboard
features.description: Role-based dashboard with links to Store, Warehouse, Inventory, etc.
user_interactions: View dashboard cards (Store Operations, Warehouse, Inventory, etc.)
Click Store Operations to go to store.html
Click Warehouse to go to warehouse.html
Click Inventory to go to inventory.html

features.name: Store Dashboard
features.description: Store operations dashboard with inventory in/out, branch stocks, sales
user_interactions: View store stats and quick actions
Navigate to Inventory In, Inventory Out, Branch Stocks, Sales Today

features.name: Warehouse Dashboard
features.description: Warehouse dashboard with inventory in and warehouse stocks
user_interactions: Navigate to Inventory In, Warehouse Stocks

features.name: Store Inventory In
features.description: Receive inventory into store (barcode scan, manual add)
user_interactions: Select branch, scan or enter product, enter quantity, submit

features.name: Warehouse Inventory In
user_interactions: Add products and quantities, submit receive

features.name: Inventory Overview
features.description: Inventory view with factory release and warehouse dispatch links
user_interactions: View inventory by location, navigate to factory release or warehouse dispatch

known_limitations.issue: App requires Supabase backend and auth; tests may need valid credentials or mocked auth
known_limitations.impact: E2E tests that hit login need real or test Supabase project
